name: Apparatus
description: A Hyperion repeater pistol that follows the usual Hyperion pattern: it starts off less accurate, then tightens up the longer you keep firing. Barrel choice shifts its role noticeably, ranging from Maliwan setups that lean into elemental output to Bandit variants that hit harder but feel less controlled.
notes: Legacy-style versions in The Pre-Sequel usually trade accuracy and fire rate for higher damage. Here, it is most commonly found as a standard world drop.
